---
title: "About"
comments: false
---

I'm [Frank DiTraglia](https://www.ditraglia.com), an applied econometrician at the University of Oxford. As an undergraduate, I hated both my first statistics course and my first econometrics course. Now I blog about both topics in my free time.

I built this site using [Quarto](https://quarto.org), with [Utterances](https://utteranc.es) for comments, and [GoatCounter](https://goatcounter.com) for privacy-respecting analytics. To find out whether econometrics has gone viral at long last, check out the [public dashboard](https://econometrics.goatcounter.com).
